hour of service each week, and bills the beneficiary (or another payer) for the remainder 
of the care. If the Medicare contractor determines that the 35 hours of care are 
reasonable and necessary, Medicare would cover the 35 hours of skilled nursing and 
home health aide visits. 

50.7.2 - Application of this Policy Revision 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3119.7.D, HHA-206.7.D 

Additional care covered by other payers
